text: Clinic timings are Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 8 PM. Closed on Sundays.
Dr. Sharma specializes in General Medicine. Dr. Patel specializes in Pediatrics.
Consultation fee is 500 rupees. Follow-up visits within 7 days are free.
We accept cash, UPI, and major insurance providers including Star Health and HDFC Ergo.
The clinic is located at MG Road, near City Mall. Parking is available.
For appointment booking, patients can call or message us on WhatsApp.
